name: Piercer
description: You increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20. Once per turn, when you hit a creature with an attack that deals Piercing damage, you can reroll one of the attack's damage dice, and you must use the new roll. When you score a critical hit that deals Piercing damage to a creature, you can roll one additional damage die when determining the extra Piercing damage the target takes.
